concept: Upload one selfie, pick from 28+ AI character/style presets, get photorealistic portraits in seconds.
why: Image-model APIs do the hard part; preset packs + share loop drive viral installs.

concept: Turns a photo into a boxed-action-figure / collectible-toy render — the current TikTok image trend.
why: Rides a live viral format; one prompt template + a share button is the whole MVP.

concept: 10 selfies in, 200 polished professional + glow-up avatars out, sold as a one-time pack.
why: Proven willingness-to-pay (AI headshot apps); pure pay-per-pack, no retention needed.

concept: Habit tracker that renders streaks as a GitHub-style contribution grid you can share.
why: $28K MRR / 25k subs proves the niche; trivial backend, retention via streak psychology.

concept: A one-tap journal for logging small daily wins, with weekly highlight recaps.
why: Part of a $600K solo portfolio; pure local-first CRUD with a feel-good loop.

concept: Dead-simple workout/set logger with progressive-overload nudges.
why: Evergreen gym demand; no integrations, monetize on plate-calculator + history.

concept: Ultra-minimal meditation app — one breathing exercise, no account, no upsell wall.
why: Meditation category is 86% negative reviews — huge gap for a simpler, honest alternative.

concept: Photo-based calorie logging — snap the plate, AI estimates macros, no barcode hunting.
why: Diet tracking is 65% negative; vision-model macro estimate removes the #1 friction.

concept: Period/cycle tracker that stores everything on-device and sells no data — privacy as the hook.
why: Period trackers are 61% negative, mostly on trust; local-first storage is a clean wedge.

concept: Generate and export on-trend color palettes from a vibe word or a photo.
why: Designers love palette tools; deterministic + tiny, easy in-app-purchase for exports.

concept: Drop in a screenshot, get a gradient-framed, device-mocked, share-ready image.
why: Every founder/marketer needs pretty screenshots; pure client-side rendering.

concept: Clipboard history manager with pinned snippets and quick paste.
why: Clipboard managers convert well on Mac; local, no servers, one-time purchase.

concept: Speak a task and it turns into a structured to-do / calendar entry / reminder.
why: Speech-to-text + LLM parse is a thin wrapper; strong daily-use hook.

concept: Speak naturally anywhere and it writes in your style with auto-edits and commands.
why: Wispr Flow proves demand; ASR + a cleanup LLM pass, OS text-injection is the only hard bit.

concept: System-wide AI autocomplete that finishes your sentence in any text field.
why: Sticky once installed; mostly an accessibility-API + small-model latency problem.

concept: Paste a video/podcast link, get a thread, LinkedIn post, newsletter, and clips.
why: Castmagic hit $30K MRR in year one; transcript-in, templates-out — fast to clone.

concept: Point it at your docs/site, get an embeddable chatbot trained on your content.
why: Chatbase reached ~$50K MRR solo; standard RAG + embed widget, proven buyers.

concept: Background removal + studio backdrops for e-commerce product shots.
why: PhotoRoom is at $60M ARR; segmentation models are commodity now, sellers pay monthly.

concept: Generates SEO-optimized blog posts and product descriptions at volume.
why: Koala.sh passed $1M ARR lean; an LLM + keyword scaffolding wrapper sells on outcome.

concept: Rewrites cold-email subject lines and openers, scored for reply likelihood.
why: Lavender is $5M+ ARR; narrow, prompt-driven, clear before/after value.

concept: Drop a long video, auto-find the best moments and cut captioned vertical clips.
why: Creators desperate for shorts volume; transcript + scene detection, big willingness to pay.

concept: Convert/merge/split/compress PDFs and images, fast and offline.
why: Pure ASO play — people search these with urgent intent; libraries do all the work.

concept: Branded QR codes with logos, colors, and scan analytics.
why: Tiny build, recurring use, easy upsell to dynamic/analytics tier.

concept: Clean unit + currency + cooking converter with a widget and quick search.
why: Massive organic search volume; a polished widget beats the cluttered incumbents.

concept: Pomodoro timer with ambient sounds, session stats, and a focus streak.
why: Evergreen, monetizes on themes/sounds; part of a proven solo portfolio.

concept: One-tap save for links with AI tagging and a weekly 'what you saved' digest.
why: Light AI tagging differentiates from plain bookmark apps; share-extension is the hook.

concept: Minimal feed/sleep/diaper tracker with one-tap logging and partner sync.
why: Parenting apps are 59% negative; sleep-deprived users crave simpler, faster logging.

concept: Snap a receipt, AI extracts vendor/amount/category, export to CSV for taxes.
why: OCR + LLM parse is solid now; freelancers pay to avoid manual expense entry.
